pages.text: The core of nuclear power lies in Uranium. You can find $(l:unnamednuclear:uranium_ore)Uranium Ore$ and its deepslate variant throughout the world. $(br2)Additionally, $(l:unnamednuclear:fluorite_ore)Fluorite Ore$ is required for the production of Hydrofluoric Acid and Fluorine gas.
Smelting these ores will yield $(l:unnamednuclear:raw_uranium)Raw Uranium$ and $(l:unnamednuclear:fluorite)Fluorite$ crystals, which are the starting points for your industrial processes.
Starting the process: smelting raw ores into usable materials.
Smelting Fluorite Ore into pure Fluorite crystals.
